description: Dynamic bridge — April 16 session (Thursday). Iran-US second round talks imminent. April 22 blockade expiry = 6 days.

market_regime.label: BLOCKADE_ESCALATION_DIPLOMACY_ACCELERATING
market_regime.key_risk: Blockade ACTIVE. April 22 expiry 6 days away. IRGC last warning not retracted. Second round talks imminent.
market_regime.dominant_risk: IRGC autonomous action or Trump reversal. Either would spike Brent $10-15 and crash Nifty 2-3%.
market_regime.crude_current_zone: WATCH_ZONE ($95-100 — elevated but declining war premium)
market_regime.regime_note: April 15 session CLOSED +1.63% at 24,231.30. Strong relief rally driven by Iran-US talks imminence. Brent $96.70 (+2.01%) — slight uptick but declining war premium narrative intact. Gold $4,816 (-0.18%) — minor decline signals risk-on. Session exceeded FLAT_TO_SIDEWAYS_UP forecast. April 16: talks confirmation could push to 24,400-24,600.

key_drivers: Nifty +1.63% today — profit booking at open expected
Iran-US second round talks "within 2 days" from April 14 → could be today/tomorrow
IREDA Q4 earnings results as PSU catalyst

session_direction.key_assumption: After strong +1.63% session, consolidation with upside bias if talks confirmed. IREDA catalyst.

stocks_to_watch.reason: P023 exit trigger at ₹130+ if Iran talks confirmed. Currently ₹129.31. SELL 30-40% at ₹130+. Watch overnight gold (currently $4,816).
+7.13% today. Momentum play — watch for continuation or mean reversion. Support ₹46, resistance ₹52.
P021 checks April 16 (>₹2,600). Currently ₹2,542 — needs +2.3% to hit target. Unlikely unless macro surprise.
Q4 FY26 earnings — FY26 loan book ₹93,075 Cr beat confirmed. Monitor NPA trend and management guidance.
GRM recovery at Brent $96.70. P017 thesis intact. ADD zone ₹168-172 (current ₹175.80).

prompt_for_morning_brief: MORNING BRIEF 2026-04-16: (1) Score opening bias — forecast FLAT_TO_SLIGHT_GAP_DOWN (-0.25%, GIFT Nifty ~24,170). Compare against actual NSE open. (2) Check Iran-US talks confirmation — were second round talks confirmed overnight? (3) Check Brent overnight — was $96.70 at April 15 close. Threshold: >$100 = bearish, <$92 = bullish. (4) Score P021 (TCS > ₹2,600, check Apr16) and P024 (Nifty range, check Apr16). (5) Today April 15 session CLOSED +1.63% at 24,231.30. (6) IREDA earnings outcome — FY26 loan book ₹93,075 Cr already announced, watch Q4 NPA and guidance.

opening_bias_actual.scoring_note: Forecast GAP_DOWN -0.80% (Gift Nifty 23,641). Actual GIFT Nifty pre-market opened at 24,054 on April 15 at 1:45 AM IST (confirmed via live data). Estimated NSE open ~24,100 (+1.08% gap up). Direction WRONG — actual GAP_UP vs forecast GAP_DOWN. Key reason: Trump's April 14 statement that Iran-US talks 'could happen in next 2 days' drove overnight risk-on in GIFT Nifty. Brent declining from $102.26 to ~$95 range added further positive momentum. Prior EOD April 14 estimate of nifty_open=23,772 (GAP_DOWN) was incorrect — did not account for GIFT Nifty surge on US risk-on sentiment.
opening_bias_actual.gift_source: 5paisa.com GIFT Nifty live data (1:45 AM IST April 15)
opening_bias_actual.correction_note: Prior estimate nifty_open=23,772 (GAP_DOWN -0.25%) corrected to GAP_UP. GIFT Nifty opened at 24,054 confirming strong positive open.
